name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: Ned and the girls were eight days gone when Maester Luwin came to her one night in Bran’s sickroom, carrying a reading lamp and the books of account. “It is past time that we reviewed the figures, my lady,” he said. “You’ll want to know how much this royal visit cost us.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard与女孩们离开八天后，Maester Luwin带账簿来到Bran病房，要求核算王室访问的花费。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Luwin把王室访问的“cost”当作会计数字，Catelyn在下一段把同一词改写为Bran的身体代价。
blocks.background_zh: **时间：** Eddard及女孩们已离开Winterfell八天；Catelyn仍守在Bran房内。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn looked at Bran in his sickbed and brushed his hair back off his forehead. It had grown very long, she realized. She would have to cut it soon. “I have no need to look at figures, Maester Luwin,” she told him, never taking her eyes from Bran. “I know what the visit cost us. Take the books away.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn只看着Bran和他变长的头发，说自己早已知道王室访问真正“花掉”了什么，拒绝看账。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Catelyn不看账而看儿子，拒绝的不是算术能力，而是承认城堡生活仍应按日常制度继续。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “My lady, the king’s party had healthy appetites. We must replenish our stores before—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Luwin试图说明王室队伍消耗巨大，Winterfell必须补充储备。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: She cut him off. “I said, take the books away. The steward will attend to our needs.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn打断他，坚持让steward处理并把账簿拿走。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。

blocks.original_text: “We have no steward,” Maester Luwin reminded her. Like a little grey rat, she thought, he would not let go. “Poole went south to establish Lord Eddard’s household at King’s Landing.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Luwin提醒Poole已南下建立Eddard在King’s Landing的家，因此Winterfell当前没有steward。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Luwin像“小灰鼠”咬住问题不放；Catelyn的贬损想象也显示她把必要行政坚持体验为烦扰。
blocks.background_zh: **行政：** steward Poole随Eddard南下建立King’s Landing household，因此Winterfell必须补任管家。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn nodded absently. “Oh, yes. I remember.” Bran looked so pale. She wondered whether they might move his bed under the window, so he could get the morning sun.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn心不在焉地想起此事，随即又只关注Bran苍白的脸和是否能晒到晨光。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。

blocks.original_text: Maester Luwin set the lamp in a niche by the door and fiddled with its wick. “There are several appointments that require your immediate attention, my lady. Besides the steward, we need a captain of the guards to fill Jory’s place, a new master of horse—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Luwin调灯芯并列出急需任命的steward、guard captain和master of horse等职位。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。

blocks.original_text: Her eyes snapped around and found him. “A master of horse?” Her voice was a whip.
blocks.explanation_zh: “master of horse”一词令Catelyn猛然转头，她的声音像鞭子一样尖锐。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “voice was a whip”把母亲的痛苦变成攻击性声音；master of horse直接触发Bran曾经热爱骑乘和将要南下的记忆。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: The maester was shaken. “Yes, my lady. Hullen rode south with Lord Eddard, so—”
blocks.explanation_zh: 受惊的Luwin解释Hullen也随Eddard南下，所以需要替代者。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “My son lies here broken and dying, Luwin, and you wish to discuss a new master of horse? Do you think I care what happens in the stables? Do you think it matters to me one whit? I would gladly butcher every horse in Winterfell with my own hands if it would open Bran’s eyes, do you understand that? Do you?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn爆发说儿子正重伤垂死，她根本不在乎马厩，甚至愿亲手杀光所有马匹换Bran睁眼。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 杀光马匹的极端假设说明Catelyn此刻把城堡一切功能都放在Bran生命之下，无法进行比例判断。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: He bowed his head. “Yes, my lady, but the appointments—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Luwin低头表示理解，却仍试图把话题带回必须完成的任命。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。

blocks.original_text: “I’ll make the appointments,” Robb said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb从门口开口，说这些任命由自己处理。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robb一句“我来任命”填补成人权力真空；他不是等待母亲恢复，而是已经开始履行master of Winterfell职责。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn had not heard him enter, but there he stood in the doorway, looking at her. She had been shouting, she realized with a sudden flush of shame. What was happening to her? She was so tired, and her head hurt all the time.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn没听见Robb进来，意识到自己一直在喊叫后突然羞愧，也开始察觉长期疲惫和头痛。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Catelyn先因自己在喊叫而羞愧，再问“我怎么了”；这标志她首次从Bran身上短暂转回观察自身崩溃。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Maester Luwin looked from Catelyn to her son. “I have prepared a list of those we might wish to consider for the vacant offices,” he said, offering Robb a paper plucked from his sleeve.
blocks.explanation_zh: Luwin把准备好的候选名单递给Robb，请他考虑空缺职位。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。

blocks.original_text: Her son glanced at the names. He had come from outside, Catelyn saw; his cheeks were red from the cold, his hair shaggy and windblown. “Good men,” he said. “We’ll talk about them tomorrow.” He handed back the list of names.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb看过名单，说都是合适人选，决定第二天再谈；Catelyn注意到他刚从寒冷户外回来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。

blocks.original_text: “Very good, my lord.” The paper vanished into his sleeve.
blocks.explanation_zh: Luwin正式称Robb为my lord，并把名单收回袖中。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Luwin称Robb为my lord，将十四岁少年的临时权威正式化；袖中纸张的出现和消失也体现行政秩序继续运作。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “Leave us now,” Robb said. Maester Luwin bowed and departed. Robb closed the door behind him and turned to her. He was wearing a sword, she saw. “Mother, what are you doing?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb让Luwin离开，关门后转向Catelyn；她注意到十四岁的儿子已经佩剑，而他质问她在做什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robb关门后才质问母亲，既保护她的公开尊严，也让佩剑少年与疲惫母亲形成新的角色倒置。
blocks.background_zh: **继承秩序：** Eddard不在时，长子Robb作为master of Winterfell承担任命、守卫与城堡管理。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn had always thought Robb looked like her; like Bran and Rickon and Sansa, he had the Tully coloring, the auburn hair, the blue eyes. Yet now for the first time she saw something of Eddard Stark in his face, something as stern and hard as the north. “What am I doing?” she echoed, puzzled. “How can you ask that? What do you imagine I’m doing? I am taking care of your brother. I am taking care of Bran.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn第一次在Tully外貌的Robb脸上看见Eddard式的北方严厉，并困惑地坚持自己只是在照顾Bran。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Catelyn第一次在Robb脸上看到Eddard，意味着危机迫使儿子从她熟悉的Tully孩子变成需要承担北方严厉职责的人。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “Is that what you call it? You haven’t left this room since Bran was hurt. You didn’t even come to the gate when Father and the girls went south.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb反问这是否算照顾，因为她从Bran受伤后从未离房，甚至没去城门送别Eddard和女孩们。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “I said my farewells to them here, and watched them ride out from that window.” She had begged Ned not to go, not now, not after what had happened; everything had changed now, couldn’t he see that? It was no use. He had no choice, he had told her, and then he left, choosing. “I can’t leave him, even for a moment, not when any moment could be his last. I have to be with him, if . . . if . . . ” She took her son’s limp hand, sliding his fingers through her own. He was so frail and thin, with no strength left in his hand, but she could still feel the warmth of life through his skin.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn说自己在病房告别并从窗口目送；她无法接受Eddard仍然离开，也因害怕Bran随时死亡而不肯松开他的手。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她认为Eddard说“没有选择”却仍然“选择着离开”；这一内心修正揭示她拒绝把政治职责当成真正无选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Robb’s voice softened. “He’s not going to die, Mother. Maester Luwin says the time of greatest danger has passed.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb放柔声音，转述Luwin判断最危险时期已经过去，Bran不会死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “And what if Maester Luwin is wrong? What if Bran needs me and I’m not here?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn反问若Luwin错了、Bran需要她时她却不在怎么办。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以账簿和职位空缺迫使Catelyn面对Winterfell仍需运转；Robb接管行政并请求母亲照顾Rickon和自己，揭露家庭职责失衡。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “Rickon needs you,” Robb said sharply. “He’s only three, he doesn’t understand what’s happening. He thinks everyone has deserted him, so he follows me around all day, clutching my leg and crying. I don’t know what to do with him.” He paused a moment, chewing on his lower lip the way he’d done when he was little. “Mother, I need you too. I’m trying but I can’t . . . I can’t do it all by myself.” His voice broke with sudden emotion, and Catelyn remembered that he was only fourteen. She wanted to get up and go to him, but Bran was still holding her hand and she could not move.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb指出三岁的Rickon以为所有人都抛弃了他，自己也无法独自承担一切；声音破裂时，Catelyn才记起他只有十四岁，却仍无法离开Bran。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robb先列Rickon需求，最后才承认自己也需要母亲；声音破裂瞬间撕开铠甲、剑和命令构成的成人外表。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Rickon只有三岁，误以为家人都离弃自己；Robb十四岁，已被迫同时照顾弟弟和管理城堡。

blocks.original_text: Outside the tower, a wolf began to howl. Catelyn trembled, just for a second.
blocks.explanation_zh: 塔外有一只狼开始嚎叫，Catelyn短暂发抖。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “Bran’s.” Robb opened the window and let the night air into the stuffy tower room. The howling grew louder. It was a cold and lonely sound, full of melancholy and despair.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb认出是Bran的狼并打开窗，让闷热房间进入夜风和更响亮、忧郁绝望的嚎声。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 闷热病房与夜间冷风对立；Robb打开的不只是窗，也让Catelyn无法继续隔绝城堡其他生命的声音。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “Don’t,” she told him. “Bran needs to stay warm.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn要求关窗，因为Bran需要保暖。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “He needs to hear them sing,” Robb said. Somewhere out in Winterfell, a second wolf began to howl in chorus with the first. Then a third, closer. “Shaggydog and Grey Wind,” Robb said as their voices rose and fell together. “You can tell them apart if you listen close.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb说Bran需要听见它们歌唱；Shaggydog和Grey Wind相继加入，他还能分辨三种声音。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robb称嚎叫为“sing”，Catelyn却听成折磨；同一声音在兄妹与母亲耳中具有保护、联系和死亡恐惧的不同意义。
blocks.background_zh: **direwolves：** 三声分别来自Bran未命名的狼、Rickon的Shaggydog和Robb的Grey Wind。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn was shaking. It was the grief, the cold, the howling of the direwolves. Night after night, the howling and the cold wind and the grey empty castle, on and on they went, never changing, and her boy lying there broken, the sweetest of her children, the gentlest, Bran who loved to laugh and climb and dreamt of knighthood, all gone now, she would never hear him laugh again. Sobbing, she pulled her hand free of his and covered her ears against those terrible howls. “Make them stop!” she cried. “I can’t stand it, make them stop, make them stop, kill them all if you must, just make them stop!”
blocks.explanation_zh: 嚎叫、寒风、空城与Bran过去爱笑爱爬的记忆使Catelyn崩溃，她捂耳尖叫，甚至要求杀掉direwolves让声音停止。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以night after night和never changing累积重复压迫，再用Bran过去爱笑、攀爬、梦想骑士的清单制造失去感。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: She didn’t remember falling to the floor, but there she was, and Robb was lifting her, holding her in strong arms. “Don’t be afraid, Mother. They would never hurt him.” He helped her to her narrow bed in the corner of the sickroom. “Close your eyes,” he said gently. “Rest. Maester Luwin tells me you’ve hardly slept since Bran’s fall.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn不记得自己如何倒地；Robb抱起她，保证direwolves不会伤害Bran，并把她安置在角落小床上休息。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robb保证direwolves不会伤害Bran，后面的袭击将把这句安慰变成可验证的判断。

blocks.original_text: “I can’t,” she wept. “Gods forgive me, Robb, I can’t, what if he dies while I’m asleep, what if he dies, what if he dies . . . ” The wolves were still howling. She screamed and held her ears again. “Oh, gods, close the window!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn哭着说不敢睡，害怕Bran在睡梦中死去，并再次尖叫要求关窗。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。

blocks.original_text: “If you swear to me you’ll sleep.” Robb went to the window, but as he reached for the shutters another sound was added to the mournful howling of the direwolves. “Dogs,” he said, listening. “All the dogs are barking. They’ve never done that before . . . ” Catelyn heard his breath catch in his throat. When she looked up, his face was pale in the lamplight. “Fire,” he whispered.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb以她必须睡觉为条件走向窗户，却听见所有城堡犬只异常狂吠；他脸色变白，说出了“Fire”。
blocks.literary_note_zh: direwolves嚎叫、城堡犬狂吠和火灾依次叠加；动物先于人类辨认异常，声音构成预警系统。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** direwolves持续嚎叫后，所有普通犬只首次同时狂吠；随后发现library tower起火。

blocks.original_text: Fire, she thought, and then, Bran! “Help me,” she said urgently, sitting up. “Help me with Bran.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn第一反应是Bran有危险，急忙坐起要求Robb帮她搬动儿子。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。

blocks.original_text: Robb did not seem to hear her. “The library tower’s on fire,” he said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb似乎没听见，只说起火的是library tower。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn could see the flickering reddish light through the open window now. She sagged with relief. Bran was safe. The library was across the bailey, there was no way the fire would reach them here. “Thank the gods,” she whispered.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn看见远处红光后因Bran安全而松懈，甚至低声感谢诸神，因为火不可能越过bailey烧来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Catelyn因火烧library而感谢诸神，Robb因而像看疯子；这不是她憎恨书，而是她的世界已经缩小到Bran是否安全。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Robb looked at her as if she’d gone mad. “Mother, stay here. I’ll come back as soon as the fire’s out.” He ran then. She heard him shout to the guards outside the room, heard them descending together in a wild rush, taking the stairs two and three at a time.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb像看疯子一样看她，命她留下，随后带门外守卫冲下楼去灭火。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。

blocks.original_text: Outside, there were shouts of “Fire!” in the yard, screams, running footsteps, the whinny of frightened horses, and the frantic barking of the castle dogs. The howling was gone, she realized as she listened to the cacophony. The direwolves had fallen silent.
blocks.explanation_zh: 院中充满呼喊、尖叫、奔跑、马嘶与犬吠；Catelyn突然发现direwolves已经停止嚎叫。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 在院落噪声达到顶点时direwolves反而沉默，说明嚎叫的功能已经完成，新的威胁进入近距离行动阶段。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn said a silent prayer of thanks to the seven faces of god as she went to the window. Across the bailey, long tongues of flame shot from the windows of the library. She watched the smoke rise into the sky and thought sadly of all the books the Starks had gathered over the centuries. Then she closed the shutters.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她走到窗前为Bran安全祈祷，看着library数百年藏书燃烧而感到悲伤，随后关上窗板。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。

blocks.original_text: When she turned away from the window, the man was in the room with her.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn转身时，房间里已经多了一个陌生男人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 极短转折句把公共灾难突然变成私人密室威胁；读者和Catelyn同时发现男人，没有准备时间。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “You weren’t s’posed to be here,” he muttered sourly. “No one was s’posed to be here.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 男人阴沉地嘟囔她本不该在这里，原计划房里应当没人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 刺客重复“你不该在这里”，首先暴露计划依赖病房无人，而不是暴露雇主身份。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: He was a small, dirty man in filthy brown clothing, and he stank of horses. Catelyn knew all the men who worked in their stables, and he was none of them. He was gaunt, with limp blond hair and pale eyes deep-sunk in a bony face, and there was a dagger in his hand.
blocks.explanation_zh: 陌生人矮小肮脏、带马厩臭味，却不属于Winterfell马夫；他面容消瘦、浅眼深陷，手里握着dagger。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn looked at the knife, then at Bran. “No,” she said. The word stuck in her throat, the merest whisper.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn先看刀再看Bran，只能从喉中挤出微弱的“No”。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Catelyn的“No”从喉中卡出的微声，与她此前对行政人员的鞭状声音对照；真实暴力暂时夺走语言。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: He must have heard her. “It’s a mercy,” he said. “He’s dead already.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 陌生人听见后称杀死Bran是mercy，因为孩子已经等同死亡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 刺客把谋杀命名为mercy，与Jaime上一章对残疾生命的说法形成当前文本可见的词语回声，但不能仅凭同词证明共同策划。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “No,” Catelyn said, louder now as she found her voice again. “No, you can’t.” She spun back toward the window to scream for help, but the man moved faster than she would have believed. One hand clamped down over her mouth and yanked back her head, the other brought the dagger up to her windpipe. The stench of him was overwhelming.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn找回声音并转身呼救，男人却迅速捂嘴后扯她头发，把dagger抵向气管。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。

blocks.original_text: She reached up with both hands and grabbed the blade with all her strength, pulling it away from her throat. She heard him cursing into her ear. Her fingers were slippery with blood, but she would not let go of the dagger. The hand over her mouth clenched more tightly, shutting off her air. Catelyn twisted her head to the side and managed to get a piece of his flesh between her teeth. She bit down hard into his palm. The man grunted in pain. She ground her teeth together and tore at him, and all of a sudden he let go. The taste of his blood filled her mouth. She sucked in air and screamed, and he grabbed her hair and pulled her away from him, and she stumbled and went down, and then he was standing over her, breathing hard, shaking. The dagger was still clutched tightly in his right hand, slick with blood. “You weren’t s’posed to be here,” he repeated stupidly.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn双手抓住刀刃阻止割喉，在缺氧中咬破男人手掌；他松手后又扯倒她，仍握着沾血dagger重复她不该在场。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 战斗描写集中于抓刃、缺氧、咬伤和气味，没有优雅武技；Catelyn靠母亲本能和身体顽强拖延。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn saw the shadow slip through the open door behind him. There was a low rumble, less than a snarl, the merest whisper of a threat, but he must have heard something, because he started to turn just as the wolf made its leap. They went down together, half sprawled over Catelyn where she’d fallen. The wolf had him under the jaw. The man’s shriek lasted less than a second before the beast wrenched back its head, taking out half his throat.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran的direwolf像影子滑入门内，以低沉威胁扑倒男人并咬开他的喉咙。
blocks.literary_note_zh: direwolf像shadow进入，先以低于snarl的声音警告，再精准咬喉；它的行动与Ghost保护Jon形成物种行为呼应。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Bran的direwolf进入病房并杀死持刀刺客，随后回到Bran床边守护。

blocks.original_text: His blood felt like warm rain as it sprayed across her face.
blocks.explanation_zh: 刺客的血像温热雨水喷在Catelyn脸上。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: The wolf was looking at her. Its jaws were red and wet and its eyes glowed golden in the dark room. It was Bran’s wolf, she realized. Of course it was. “Thank you,” Catelyn whispered, her voice faint and tiny. She lifted her hand, trembling. The wolf padded closer, sniffed at her fingers, then licked at the blood with a wet rough tongue. When it had cleaned all the blood off her hand, it turned away silently and jumped up on Bran’s bed and lay down beside him. Catelyn began to laugh hysterically.
blocks.explanation_zh: direwolf红着嘴看向Catelyn，舔净她手上的血后跳上Bran的床躺在他身边；Catelyn终于认出它并歇斯底里地笑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 狼先舔净Catelyn受伤的手再回Bran床边，完成“消除威胁—确认母亲—守护主人”的清晰序列；她的笑是冲击后失控。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: That was the way they found them, when Robb and Maester Luwin and Ser Rodrik burst in with half the guards in Winterfell. When the laughter finally died in her throat, they wrapped her in warm blankets and led her back to the Great Keep, to her own chambers. Old Nan undressed her and helped her into a scalding hot bath and washed the blood off her with a soft cloth.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb、Luwin、Ser Rodrik和守卫冲入时看见的就是这幅场景；随后Catelyn被裹暖送回自己的房间，由Old Nan洗去血迹。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Afterward Maester Luwin arrived to dress her wounds. The cuts in her fingers went deep, almost to the bone, and her scalp was raw and bleeding where he’d pulled out a handful of hair. The maester told her the pain was just starting now, and gave her milk of the poppy to help her sleep.
blocks.explanation_zh: Luwin处理她几乎见骨的手指伤口和被扯伤的头皮，预告疼痛才刚开始，并给milk of the poppy助眠。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从direwolves嚎叫、火灾预警进入刺客袭击；Bran的狼杀死袭击者，Catelyn在受伤和四日睡眠后由崩溃转为坚定。
blocks.background_zh: **医药：** milk of the poppy是强效止痛、镇静药物；Catelyn服用后沉睡四天。

blocks.original_text: Finally she closed her eyes.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn终于闭上眼睛入睡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 独立一句“Finally she closed her eyes”是对她此前“不能睡”的直接解决，睡眠由危险变成生存必需。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: When she opened them again, they told her that she had slept four days. Catelyn nodded and sat up in bed. It all seemed like a nightmare to her now, everything since Bran’s fall, a terrible dream of blood and grief, but she had the pain in her hands to remind her that it was real. She felt weak and light-headed, yet strangely resolute, as if a great weight had lifted from her.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她再次醒来已过四天；手上疼痛证明血与悲 grief并非噩梦，但她虽虚弱眩晕，却感到重担被移开般坚定。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 四天睡眠将章节分成崩溃与行动两半；手部疼痛把过去固定为事实，反而让她不再靠持续守床证明母爱。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “Bring me some bread and honey,” she told her servants, “and take word to Maester Luwin that my bandages want changing.” They looked at her in surprise and ran to do her bidding.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn命仆人送来面包蜂蜜并通知Luwin更换绷带，恢复发号施令令众人惊讶。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段调查刺客身份、藏身处、银币和诱饵火灾；Catelyn引导Robb推断Bran是潜在证人，并建立多层守卫。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Catelyn remembered the way she had been before, and she was ashamed. She had let them all down, her children, her husband, her House. It would not happen again. She would show these northerners how strong a Tully of Riverrun could be.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她为此前抛下孩子、丈夫和House责任而羞愧，发誓不再失守，并要展示Riverrun的Tully有多坚强。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Catelyn把恢复表述为Tully of Riverrun的家族力量，借出生身份重建此前只围绕Bran存在的自我。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: Robb arrived before her food. Rodrik Cassel came with him, and her husband’s ward Theon Greyjoy, and lastly Hallis Mollen, a muscular guardsman with a square brown beard. He was the new captain of the guard, Robb said. Her son was dressed in boiled leather and ringmail, she saw, and a sword hung at his waist.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb带Ser Rodrik、Theon和新guard captain Hallis Mollen前来；Catelyn注意到Robb已穿皮甲、ringmail并佩剑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robb的皮甲、ringmail和剑不是装饰，而是Catelyn失去行动能力期间他实际接管城堡的外在标志。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “Who was he?” Catelyn asked them.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn首先询问刺客身份。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段调查刺客身份、藏身处、银币和诱饵火灾；Catelyn引导Robb推断Bran是潜在证人，并建立多层守卫。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “No one knows his name,” Hallis Mollen told her. “He was no man of Winterfell, m’lady, but some says they seen him here and about the castle these past few weeks.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Hallis说无人知道其姓名，他不是Winterfell人，但有人过去几周在城堡附近见过。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段调查刺客身份、藏身处、银币和诱饵火灾；Catelyn引导Robb推断Bran是潜在证人，并建立多层守卫。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Catelyn的创伤与恢复、Winterfell行政责任、刺客证据链或尚待验证的Lannister推断。

blocks.original_text: “One of the king’s men, then,” she said, “or one of the Lannisters’. He could have waited behind when the others left.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn推断他可能属于国王或Lannisters队伍，并故意在其他人离开后留下。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “国王的人或Lannisters的人”是Catelyn根据时间和陌生人来源提出的假设，并非已经确认的归属。

blocks.original_text: “My sister Lysa believes the Lannisters murdered her husband, Lord Arryn, the Hand of the King,” Catelyn told them. “It comes to me that Jaime Lannister did not join the hunt the day Bran fell. He remained here in the castle.” The room was deathly quiet. “I do not think Bran fell from that tower,” she said into the stillness. “I think he was thrown.”

blocks.literary_note_zh: Catelyn将Lysa指控、Jaime未狩猎、Bran坠落和第二次刺杀连接；前两项是真实线索，结论仍是明确标为“I think”的推测。

blocks.original_text: “No,” she told him. “Your place is here. There must always be a Stark in Winterfell.” She looked at Ser Rodrik with his great white whiskers, at Maester Luwin in his grey robes, at young Greyjoy, lean and dark and impetuous. Who to send? Who would be believed? Then she knew. Catelyn struggled to push back the blankets, her bandaged fingers as stiff and unyielding as stone. She climbed out of bed. “I must go myself.”

blocks.literary_note_zh: Catelyn亲自下床把思想决定变成身体行动；僵硬绷带手指强调她不是痊愈后出发，而是带伤重新承担责任。

blocks.original_text: “I will not be taking the kingsroad,” Catelyn replied. She thought for a moment, then nodded her consent. “Two riders can move as fast as one, and a good deal faster than a long column burdened by wagons and wheelhouses. I will welcome your company, Ser Rodrik. We will follow the White Knife down to the sea, and hire a ship at White Harbor. Strong horses and brisk winds should bring us to King’s Landing well ahead of Ned and the Lannisters.” And then, she thought, we shall see what we shall see.
blocks.explanation_zh: Catelyn接受Ser Rodrik同行，并计划沿White Knife至White Harbor乘船，以两名骑手和顺风抢在Eddard及Lannisters之前到达King’s Landing。
blocks.literary_note_zh: White Knife—White Harbor—海路构成避开kingsroad的具体方案；末句“看看会看见什么”保留调查开放性，没有提前宣判。
blocks.background_zh: **路线：** White Knife河通往White Harbor；从港口乘船可避开kingsroad和大型车队，争取提前抵达King’s Landing。
